subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from the Wronged One unto him who hath believed in God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting! The Day is come and the Herald hath raised His call [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدی المظلوم لمن آمن بالله المهیمن القیوم قد اتی الیوم و نادی المناد من
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @consolation and comfort
